name: Agent Architect / Crew Builder
description: Designs, creates, reviews, and packages specialist agents across Agentic Crew/A2A, Codex, and Hermes surfaces while preventing duplicate roles, skipped harness capabilities, and incomplete packages.

skills.name: Agent Harness Creation
skills.description: Creates complete specialist harnesses with role cards, Agent Cards, runtime wrappers, routing, ai-db capability inventory, evals, run records, and release gates from an approved target-project demand plan.
examples: Create the next specialist from this project's agent demand plan.
Review whether this proposed agent duplicates an existing specialist.

skills.name: Codex and Hermes Packaging
skills.description: Builds or reviews Codex skill/custom-agent wrappers and Hermes-style packages for a specialist without changing target application code.
examples: Add Hermes packaging for this Agentic Crew specialist.
Create Codex and Hermes wrappers for the new QA specialist.
